overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Subnautica showing underwater exploration. The player swims through a bioluminescent reef with glowing sphere-shaped flora and electric creatures, then transitions through open water into the murky, brown crash zone surrounding the massive Aurora spaceship wreck.

scene_state.functional_zone: bioluminescent underwater reef with glowing sphere trees

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily forward through the bioluminescent reef, observing the glowing flora and fauna

notable_agents.action: bioluminescent electric eel-like creature swimming through the water

entered.detail: massive spherical tree-like structure covered in glowing blue bioluminescent dots
clusters of small glowing purple and blue coral formations on the seafloor
tall thin stalks with glowing tips rising from the seafloor

segments.scene_description: The player swims through a vibrant bioluminescent reef in clear deep-blue water. Large spherical trees covered in glowing dots dominate the center view while an electric creature swims in the distance. The seafloor is sandy with scattered glowing coral clusters.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep open water transition approaching crash zone

events.description: water visibility decreases significantly and color shifts from deep blue to murky brown

agents.ego_description: swimming through increasingly murky open water as the environment transitions from the reef to the crash zone

entered.detail: massive dark silhouette of the crashed spaceship becoming visible through the murk

segments.scene_description: Leaving the bioluminescent reef behind, the player swims through open water where visibility gradually decreases. The water takes on a murky brown tint as the massive silhouette of the Aurora wreckage looms in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: crashed starship wreckage in thick murky brown water

events.description: entering the immediate vicinity of the Aurora wreck with massive metal structures surrounding the player
swimming upward along the hull of the wreck while examining the structural details

agents.ego_description: carefully swimming around and examining the massive Aurora spaceship wreckage, navigating through debris fields

entered.detail: massive curved metal hull of the crashed spaceship with detailed paneling and damage
scattered metal fragments and structural pieces from the ship scattered on the seafloor
tall towering wreckage sections and broken frameworks rising from the seafloor

segments.scene_description: The player explores the massive Aurora wreckage in thick murky brown water with very low visibility. The camera moves along the enormous metal hull sections and through debris fields, examining the twisted superstructure of the crashed spaceship rising from the sandy seafloor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that transforms from a vibrant, bioluminescent sanctuary into the murky ruins of a massive shipwreck. It begins in clear deep-blue water, gliding past large spherical trees covered in glowing dots and scattered coral clusters while an electric creature swims in the distance. As the player leaves the reef behind, the scene shifts into open water where the visibility gradually decreases and the blue hues fade into a murky brown tint. The camera then advances toward the looming silhouette of the Aurora, finally entering a thick haze of debris to explore the enormous metal hull and twisted superstructure of the crashed spaceship rising from the sandy seafloor.
